mapper.update: UPDATE `process_document` SET `module_instance_id` = #{moduleInstanceId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `generated_state_record_id` = #{generatedStateRecordId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `document_type_code` = #{documentTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `document_no` = #{documentNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `document_title` = #{documentTitle, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `document_status` = #{documentStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `snapshot_json` = #{snapshotJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} WHERE `document_id` = #{documentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
